candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row appears directly beneath selected SG&A parent rows ('Sales expenses' and 'Administrative expenses') and above their corresponding 'Balancing value' rows, indicating it is a component already embedded in those selected SG&A totals. Adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the sum of 'Sales expenses' and 'Administrative expenses'. The visible SG&A D&A rows sit as sub-components under those parent totals, evidenced by the adjacent 'Balancing value' rows that reconcile back to each selected expense line. Therefore D&A is already included in the selected SG&A bucket and should not be added separately. No R&D row is present, and XRD is empty.
